nodes.label: Call console.error()
nodes.detail: console.error('Sync failed: Supabase client not initialized');

nodes.label: Operation succeeds?
nodes.detail: try { console.log('Starting sync...'); do { this.retrySync = false; const unsynced = await chatDb.getUnsyncedMessages(); console.log(`Found ${unsynced.length} unsynced messages`); for (const localMsg of unsynced) { await this.syncMessage(localMsg); } } while (this.retrySync || (await chatDb.getUnsyncedMessages()).length > 0); } catch (error) { console.error('Sync failed with error:', error); } finally { this.isSyncing = false; this.retrySync = false; console.log('Sync finished'); }

nodes.label: Handle internal condition: parentMsg && parentMsg.is_synced && parentMsg.id
nodes.detail: if (parentMsg && parentMsg.is_synced && parentMsg.id) { parentId = parentMsg.id; // Resolve to Supabase UUID } else if (!parentMsg) { parentId = undefined; } else { console.log(`Deferring sync for message ${localMsg.id} until parent ${parentId} is synced.`); return; }
